Jessica Taylor
Phoenix, AZ

Summary:
Detail-oriented and hardworking individual with over 3 years of experience in fast-paced warehouse environments. Proven ability to efficiently pick and pack orders while maintaining high levels of accuracy. Comfortable standing for long periods and lifting up to 50 lbs. Seeking to leverage my skills in a Picker/Packer role to contribute to team success.

Experience:
Warehouse Associate  
ABC Logistics, Phoenix, AZ  
June 2021 - Present  
- Efficiently pick and pack customer orders for shipment, ensuring accuracy and timeliness.  
- Operate hand trucks and pallet jacks to transport products within the warehouse.  
- Assist in inventory management, including stock replenishment and cycle counts.  
- Maintain a clean and organized workspace to promote safety and efficiency.

Order Picker  
XYZ Distribution, Tempe, AZ  
March 2019 - May 2021  
- Executed picking and packing of various products, meeting daily quotas in a high-volume warehouse.  
- Collaborated with team members to streamline processes and improve order fulfillment times.  
- Conducted quality checks to ensure products were in good condition before shipment.
